name: SubdivideLayer
description: Subdivides a node in a LayerStructure tree at the given path. Returns a modified copy of the root LayerStructure with sublayers inserted at the target node.

inputParameters.name: path
inputParameters.description: Path into the LayerStructure tree identifying the node to subdivide (e.g. {1} for the core sublayer of a 3-layer structure).

inputParameters.name: thicknesses
inputParameters.description: Sublayer thicknesses from exterior to interior. One value may be None to absorb remaining thickness.

outputParameters.name: layer_structure
outputParameters.description: Modified copy of the root LayerStructure with the target node subdivided. Connect to CT_Panel's 'layer_structure' input.
